properties.Test Case: Test Setup: 3 Bloom Library accounts are needed: 1) a Regular user (no permissions); 2) a Moderator (all access); 3) a Collection Editor (access to a particular bookshelf called X).
properties.Steps: Test Setup: 3 Bloom Library accounts are needed: 1) a Regular user (no permissions); 2) a Moderator (all access); 3) a Collection Editor (access to a particular bookshelf called X).

properties.Test Case: Make a new book with no title and no text. Publish Tab Web. Verify both missing title and missing copyright appears. Click to fix copyright --> copyright warning is removed. Click to add title --> Edit opens at Front Cover. Publish Tab Web --> missing title warning remains. Click to fix --> Edit. Add a title. Publish Tab Web --> now the "Agreements" appear. Tick agreements. Sign In as a Regular user. If you are uploading to prod (not dev.blorg), make sure to mark DRAFT. Upload book. No collision dialog is presented.
properties.Steps:
- Make a new book with no title and no text. Publish Tab Web. Verify both missing title and missing copyright appears. Click to fix copyright --> copyright warning is removed. Click to add title --> Edit opens at Front Cover. Publish Tab Web --> missing title warning remains. Click to fix --> Edit. Add a title. Publish Tab Web --> now the "Agreements" appear. Tick agreements. Sign In as a Regular user. 
If you are uploading to prod (not dev.blorg), make sure to mark DRAFT. Upload book. No collision dialog is presented.

properties.Test Case: Reupload by same user: in Edit, change title of book and republish it. After clicking the Upload Book button, "Is this an update" dialog appears. You should see notice that "you-have-permission". Choose "Yes" and click Upload. After completion, click VIEW ON BLOOM LIBRARY button to verify the new book title appears on Bloom Library. Verify that Draft status is the same.
properties.Steps:
- Reupload by same user: in Edit, change title of book and republish it. After clicking the Upload Book button, "Is this an update" dialog appears.
You should see notice that "you-have-permission". Choose "Yes" and click Upload.
After completion, click VIEW ON BLOOM LIBRARY button to verify the new book title appears on Bloom Library.
Verify that Draft status is the same.

properties.Test Case: Reupload by user without permission: In Bloom Publish: Web, click to Sign Out. Then Sign In with "Collection Editor" account. After clicking the Upload Book button, the "Is this an update" Dialog should show that you do not have permission and you can't update the book. Click "No, these are different" and click "Upload". Verify that the upload proceeds and verify the book on Blorg.
properties.Steps: - Reupload by user without permission: In Bloom Publish: Web, click to Sign Out. Then Sign In with "Collection Editor" account. After clicking the Upload Book button, the "Is this an update" Dialog should show that you do not have permission and you can't update the book. Click "No, these are different" and click "Upload". Verify that the upload proceeds and verify the book on Blorg.

properties.Test Case: Reupload by user with Moderator permission: In Bloom Edit, change the title once again. In Bloom Publish: Web, Sign Out, then back in with Moderator account. After clicking the Upload Book button, the collision shows you have permission. Ensure the uploader avatar matches the original uploader which is different from the avatar beside "you have permission". Under the "yes" option is a tick box to change the uploader. Do not tick that box. Choose "Yes" and then the UPLOAD button. Verify the uploaded book has the new title and has retained the original uploader. Verify that Draft status is the same.
properties.Steps:
- Reupload by user with Moderator permission: In Bloom Edit, change the title once again. In Bloom Publish: Web, Sign Out, then back in with Moderator account. After clicking the Upload Book button, the collision shows you have permission. Ensure the uploader avatar matches the original uploader which is different from the avatar beside "you have permission". Under the "yes" option is a tick box to change the uploader. Do not tick that box. Choose "Yes" and then the UPLOAD button. Verify the uploaded book has the new title and has retained the original uploader.
Verify that Draft status is the same.
